# ADR-0001: First decision

## Status

Accepted — 2026-01-05

## Context

A well-formed decision with no seeded violations of its own, sole occupant of this directory.

## Decision

Use this as the real half of a bullet-list index that also cites a file which does not exist.

## Consequences

None — the seeded violation lives in the index, not in this ADR.
